name: UV Protection Sunglasses
description: Stylish UV protection sunglasses perfect for summer outings. Features polarized lenses and UV400 protection to shield your eyes from harmful sun rays.

name: Summer Beach Dress
description: Lightweight and breathable summer beach dress. Perfect for casual beach trips and hot weather outings with comfortable fit.

name: Waterproof Sunscreen SPF 50
description: Professional-grade waterproof sunscreen with SPF 50 protection. Water-resistant for up to 80 minutes and dermatologist-tested.

name: Beach Hat Wide Brim
description: Wide-brimmed beach hat for maximum sun protection. Made with breathable material and includes UV-blocking technology.

name: Hydrating Body Lotion
description: Lightweight hydrating lotion perfect for post-beach skin care. Contains aloe vera and coconut extract for soothing relief.

name: Swim Shorts Collection
description: Comfortable and stylish swim shorts with quick-dry technology. Features multiple color options and secure pockets.

name: Hydration Water Bottle
description: Insulated water bottle that keeps drinks cold for up to 24 hours. Made with eco-friendly materials and perfect for summer activities.

name: Portable Beach Towel
description: Quick-dry microfiber beach towel that's lightweight and compact. Perfect for travel and takes up minimal space.
